message:
refactor(runtime_compat): replace tokio::select! with futures-based macro (ft-h7kwb)

Replace `pub use tokio::select` with a custom `macro_rules! select` that
uses `futures::future::select` + `futures::pin_mut!`. This removes the
last direct tokio re-export from the runtime_compat boundary. All 6
caller sites (web/server.rs x3, search_bridge.rs x1, web/sse.rs x2)
continue to work unchanged — the macro syntax mirrors tokio::select!
for the 2-branch case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
